obs: Saw Khalid live at Greek Theatre Berkeley with sister Sophia; loved it.
Really into Khalid's soulful, emotive sound. Considering The Weeknd, Anderson .Paak, Bryson Tiller, Daniel Caesar, H.E.R., Toro y Moi, Jhené Aiko.
Has ticket to Taylor Swift at Levi's Stadium Santa Clara Aug 20; obtained in January.
Learned added sugar causes obesity, diabetes, heart disease, cavities. Concerned about own consumption.
Wants to reduce added sugar intake. Considering substitutes like fruit, dark chocolate, homemade treats with honey/maple syrup.
Has sweet tooth, struggles to resist sugary foods despite knowing health impact.
Concerned about fake news. Fact-checking resources recommended: Snopes, PolitiFact, FactCheck.org, Washington Post Fact Checker, Reuters Fact Check, AP Fact Check.
Interested in high-end fashion. Prefers Saint Laurent Rive Gauche over neutral colors, wants vibrant options.
Would listen to Mozart forever if choosing one composer. Music feels like meditation, transports to another place/time.
Took 10-day social media break Feb 15-25; really helped reset habits.
Plans Sunday as social media-free day. Will unfollow accounts that hurt self-esteem, set specific check times, use website blockers during work.
Wants daily 3-item gratitude journal practice. Considering physical book format over Instagram posts.
Getting back into reading. Will start Goodreads Reading Challenge with 20-book goal for the year.
Listened to The Nightingale audiobook for 6 weeks. Loves historical fiction.
Grandma's funeral on Feb 15. Planning photo album/scrapbook with chronological layout, simple Classic Elegance design.
Working on quilt for sister's birthday. Mix of velvet and lace. Experimenting with natural indigo dye in yarn.
Sewing machine just serviced. Making cotton lawn summer top with running stitch embroidery, scalloped hem, contrasting thread.
Took month off yoga due to 3-week cold and stomach issues flaring up. Lower back pain concern. Returning gently.
Considering probiotics and nutritionist consultation for digestive issues. Interested in comprehensive wellness insurance covering acupuncture, massage.
Oscillates between luxury and budget shopping. Recently splurged $2K on Gucci handbag; trying to be more mindful.
Splurges when stressed or down. Planning to use Mint/YNAB digital tools + envelope system for discretionary spending. Feels guilty about Gucci purchase.
Interested in Victorian antique door knockers, antique clock restoration, furniture restoration. Looking for online courses.
Rewrote University of Edinburgh Statement of Purpose. Passion: using AI for environmental sustainability. Influenced by MS Swaminathan Research Foundation study camp.
Majoring in Economics. Has taken Python programming and data visualization certifications. Exploring machine learning and deep learning. Considering Master's in Data Science.
Applying to University of Sussex. Considering scholarships: Chancellor's International, Sussex Graduate, Sussex Excellence, Sussex India, Commonwealth Shared Scholarship.
Planning to submit own script to theater festivals. Interested in FringeNYC Overall Excellence Awards. Seeking submission guidelines.
Loves Brooklyn Nine-Nine, The Good Place. Interested in Hulu originals: Shrill, Ramy, Catch-22, Little Fires Everywhere, The Handmaid's Tale.
Exploring Apple TV+ (The Morning Show, See, Servant) and HBO Max free trials. Considering rotating subscriptions to manage costs.
Planning French-inspired dinner party after Paris trip. Making Coq au Vin, Porchon de Haut (pork belly), Ratatouille. Invited Rachel and Emily with Paris souvenirs.
Bedroom small; looking for dresser with smooth-gliding drawers. Considering West Elm Mid-Century (ball-bearing glides) or Room & Board. Wants modern, minimalist design. Checking 30-day return policy.
Great-aunt born in Hong Kong. Learning Cantonese via Duolingo, CantoneseClass101, HelloTalk. Exploring Cantonese opera, Hong Kong heritage. Recipes: roast goose, egg tarts.
Planning trip to Toronto to visit relatives. Cantonese restaurant recommendations: Swatow, Jade Garden, Lai Wah Heen, Mother's Dumplings, Pearl Harbourfront.
Struggles to maintain cleaning routines past few days. Loses motivation despite enthusiasm. Planning reward system: bubble bath, ice cream, movie, shopping spree after month of adherence.
Upgrading dining room lighting. Wants under-cabinet puck lights with warm white (2700K-3000K) color. Considering matte ceramic base with earthy tone or organic vase shape.
Learned George Washington owned 300+ slaves; freed some in will but not all. Martha inherited slaves; unclear when completely freed.
